topIngredients.name: AHA Blend (Glycolic, Tartaric, Lactic)
topIngredients.benefit: Multi-acid exfoliation for even resurfacing and glow

topIngredients.name: Salicylic Acid (BHA)
topIngredients.benefit: Penetrates pores to clear congestion and blackheads

topIngredients.name: Hyaluronic Acid
topIngredients.benefit: Prevents over-exfoliation dryness with simultaneous hydration

verdict: Drunk Elephant TLC Babyfacial combines AHA and BHA exfoliants with smart hydrating ingredients for a comprehensive weekly resurfacing treatment. The acid-to-hydration balance makes it one of the most tolerable strong exfoliants.
